overall.description: Gameplay footage from Mafia III showing protagonist Lincoln Clay walking through a 1960s New Orleans-inspired city on an overcast, humid morning with wet streets. The character transitions from a residential neighborhood with historic wooden houses across an intersection into an industrial waterfront district with factories and smokestacks.

events.description: yellow vintage sedan drives past from left to right across the intersection
steps from crosswalk onto concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across pedestrian crosswalk toward historic residential houses

notable_agents.action: yellow vintage sedan driving across the intersection

entered.detail: two-story historic wooden home with blue shutters and wraparound white porch
black ornate cast-iron street lamp on sidewalk
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a residential intersection with wet pavement reflecting the overcast sky. The character crosses the street as a yellow vintage car passes by, approaching a historic blue-shuttered house with a white porch and flower beds.

events.description: industrial complex with smokestacks becomes visible on the distant horizon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk past historic homes with porches

entered.detail: brown wooden house covered in green ivy with white porch railings
factory buildings with tall smokestacks visible through atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the residential sidewalk, the character passes an ivy-covered cottage while the environment transitions toward an industrial district. Factory smokestacks become visible in the distant haze as the character approaches an intersection.

events.description: crossing the street toward the industrial area
entering industrial waterfront zone with warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and approaching industrial waterfront area

large corrugated metal industrial building with flat roof

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the intersection where a woman with an umbrella walks the opposite way. A stop sign marks the corner as the residential area gives way to industrial warehouses and prominent factory smokestacks dominating the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront road with harbor view

entered.detail: metal railing fence running along the water edge
calm harbor water visible beyond the fence
tall downtown buildings visible through atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: Walking along the industrial waterfront, the character passes a metal fence revealing harbor water on the right. Industrial warehouses line the left side while the distant city skyline rises through the haze ahead, with other pedestrians sharing the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a humid residential neighborhood that gradually transitions into a gritty industrial waterfront. It begins at a residential intersection with wet, reflective pavement, following the character past a yellow vintage car and toward a historic blue-shuttered house with a white porch. As the character continues along the sidewalk past an ivy-covered cottage, the environment shifts and factory smokestacks begin to emerge through the distant haze. The scene then opens up as the character crosses another intersection, passing a woman with an umbrella while the quaint homes give way to towering warehouses and dominating industrial chimneys. Finally, the camera moves along the waterfront, passing a metal fence that reveals the harbor water on the right as the distant city skyline rises through the mist ahead.
